override_reason_options.contract_rewrite: Review override notes and encode recurring blockers into explicit acceptance checks.
override_reason_options.prompt_rewrite: Add a post-mortem checklist seeded from recent override notes.

override_reason_options.contract_rewrite: Set stricter max-cost / max-latency targets in objective profile.
override_reason_options.prompt_rewrite: Prioritize cost-efficient plans and include tradeoff justification.

override_reason_options.contract_rewrite: Add human-context dependency markers and required reviewer checkpoints.
override_reason_options.prompt_rewrite: Require ambiguity classification and human-clarification request when context is missing.

outcome_status_options.calibration_impact: Improves empirical accept rate for selected contender.
Increases override rate and applies override reason weighting in policy-learning.
Increases rework rate for selected contender.
Counts as non-accept and raises calibration gap when confidence was high.
Marks outcome as disputed for risk tracking and review-depth analytics.

reviewer_decision_options.calibration_impact: Improves accept-rate and low-friction routing confidence for this contender.
Increases rework and iterative feedback signals for policy adaptation.
Counts as failed selection signal and increases risk-aware downweighting.

override_reason_options.contract_rewrite: Raise safety and policy constraints to mandatory hard-gate checks.
override_reason_options.prompt_rewrite: Insert explicit policy-risk self-audit and fail-closed escalation path.

override_reason_options.contract_rewrite: Require deterministic test-harness pass evidence before recommendation.
override_reason_options.prompt_rewrite: Force candidate to run and summarize failing tests before final output.
